response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with distributed systems, telemetry, and experimentation-adjacent tooling (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks) but lacks direct experience with formal experimentation/measurement platforms. His hands-on background in high-availability systems, cross-team collaboration, and leadership aligns well with the role's requirements, though his experimentation-specific experience is not explicitly highlighted.
strengths: Strong foundation in distributed systems and high-availability architectures (Dunnhumby, re:cinq)
Proven leadership in building scalable platforms (GISCollective, MCP frameworks)
Experience with AI tooling and developer productivity systems (re:cinq, MCP)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with experimentation/measurement platforms or feature-flagging systems
No direct evidence of statistical methods or experimental analysis in past roles
Short tenure in recent roles (e.g., 6 months at re:cinq) may raise questions about long-term commitment
